backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the EPIQ Life backend, implementing user authentication (Internet Identity and Firebase/EPIQ Shield), EpiqID-to-Principal mappings, session management, authentication audit logging, and multi-chain wallet operations with access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature: updating `createWallet` error handling to return structured error variants mappable by the frontend's `walletErrors.ts` utility, eliminating generic error messages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/EPIQ_LIFE_UI_STYLE_GUIDE.md: Comprehensive UI style guide for EPIQ Life defining the color system (purple #6A5ACD primary, gold #EFBF04 secondary), typography hierarchy, accessibility requirements, and dark mode variations.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the EPIQ Life React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and InternetIdentityProvider, and conditionally renders LandingPage, LaunchInitialization, ProfileSetup, or Dashboard based on authentication and profile state.
frontend/src/components/AdminTab.tsx: Admin dashboard component with four sub-tabs (Members, Courses, Display Name History, Phase 1 Testing) supporting Firebase user import, member type management, and user progress/rewards inspection.
frontend/src/components/AuthMethodSelect: Renders a two-option authentication selector allowing users to choose between Internet Identity (decentralized) or EPIQ Shield (Firebase-based) login, opening a FirebaseAuthDialog for the latter.
frontend/src/components/ChecklistAnalyze: Displays a progress checklist for onboarding tasks (profile setup, learning modules, wallet connection) by querying user profile and quest progress data, showing completion percentage.
frontend/src/components/CourseManagement: Admin tab for viewing and creating courses, showing existing courses with expandable modules and a dialog form for creating new courses with title, description, and category fields.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNameHisto: Admin tab that displays display name change history records with search capabilities by principal ID or display name, rendered in a sortable table with timestamps.
frontend/src/components/EmojiPicker.tsx: A popover emoji picker component with categorized emoji tabs (smileys, gestures, people, nature, food, activities, travel) and a search input, invoking a callback on emoji selection.
frontend/src/components/EpcRewardsDialog: A dialog component that displays a user's EPC token rewards history and module completion records in a tabbed interface, fetching data via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/EpiqIdAuthDialog: An empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for an EPIQ ID authentication dialog component.
frontend/src/components/EpiqWalletsPanel: A panel component for managing EVM wallets that allows users to create new wallets (up to 9), displays stored wallet addresses, and shows one-time credentials (private key, recovery phrase) after wallet creation.
frontend/src/components/FirebaseAuthDial: A multi-step authentication dialog that authenticates users via Firebase using an EPIQ ID and password, handles session management, syncs user profile data, and redirects on success.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component that renders a centered copyright notice for EPIQ TRUST.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header component with the EPIQ Life logo, theme toggle, and an authenticated user dropdown menu (profile settings, logout) or a login button that opens an auth method selector.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: A full-screen loading/error component that shows a progress indicator during app initialization and displays retry options with troubleshooting tips on connection failure.
frontend/src/components/MessagingTab.tsx: A messaging UI component that allows users to find other users by display name and exchange messages, with auto-retry logic when the backend actor becomes available and emoji picker support.
frontend/src/components/ModuleContentDia: A dialog component for stepping through quest module content (tell/show/do steps), handling quiz submission with pass/fail feedback, and triggering module completion with EPC reward notifications.
frontend/src/components/Phase1TestingPla: A static informational component that renders a structured Phase 1 testing checklist covering dual authentication, data consistency, and session transition validation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSettingsD: A dialog that lets authenticated users update their display name, while showing read-only full name and email fields pulled from their existing profile.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A mandatory onboarding modal for new users to enter their name, display name, email, and member type to create their EPIQ Life profile.
frontend/src/components/QuestTab.tsx: A quest/course browser tab that lists courses and their modules with progress tracking, EPC rewards display, and launches a ModuleContentDialog for interactive learning steps.
frontend/src/components/SecurityAuditLog: A React component that displays and filters authentication audit logs by principal, EPIQ ID, method, or status, with support for CSV export and expired session cleanup.
frontend/src/components/UserProgressDial: A modal dialog that shows a specific user's quest and course progress, including completion percentages and step-level status, fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/WalletTab.tsx: A wallet management tab that displays ETH, BTC, and ICP balances, transaction history, and allows sending crypto to a recipient principal address.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEpiqId.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useFirebaseAuth.tsx: A custom hook that wraps Firebase authentication flows (login, data sync, logout, session check) against the ICP backend actor, exposing status and error state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity React context and hook for managing ICP authentication via AuthClient, including login, logout, and persisted identity state across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend interactions including user profiles, wallet operations, access control, courses, quests, and messaging. Also exports a typed WalletOperationError class for structured wallet error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) using OKLCH values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard_REFERENCE.t: Archived reference file preserving the original tabbed-navigation dashboard design (Wallet, Messages, Quests, Admin tabs) that was replaced by top-level routing; not actively used.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Tabbed dashboard page combining Wallet, Messages, Quest, and (conditionally) Admin tabs in a single view, with a personalized welcome header and quick-stats overview using user profile, rewards, and progress data.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Route-based dashboard overview page that displays a personalized welcome header and summary cards for Wallet, Messages, and Quest sections, navigating to separate routes on interaction.
frontend/src/pages/GovernanceDashboard.t: Admin-only governance dashboard page that aggregates platform-wide stats (total users, EPC distributed, active quests, completion rate) and provides navigation to admin management sections, with access control enforced via isCallerAdmin.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component displaying a hero section, feature cards, and an authentication flow that toggles between a 'Get Started' button and an AuthMethodSelector for Internet Identity or EPIQ Shield login.
Initialization screen that sequentially verifies authentication, backend actor connection, and user profile loading with 15-second timeouts, then redirects to the dashboard upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form page that collects a new user's name, display name, email, member type, and ICP wallet address, then saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/utils/evmAddress.ts: Utility module providing functions to validate, normalize, and truncate EVM (Ethereum-style) addresses, including a strict validator that throws on invalid input.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and removing sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/src/utils/walletErrors.ts: Error normalization utility that maps backend WalletError variants, raw error strings, and generic Error objects into safe, user-facing messages without leaking internal details.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current build/fix state of the EPIQ Life project, recording completed sub-tasks for backend wallet creation, known issues, architectural notes, and pending action requests (AR-1 through AR-5) covering credential return, listWallets security, and error handling improvements.
